answers: Sushi: Japanese dish of vinegared rice with fish/vegetables. Types: nigiri, maki, sashimi.
Exploring sushi is a delicious journey. Try different varieties and styles.
The world of sushi is rich and diverse. Start with the basics and expand your palate.
Sushi has a fascinating history and culture behind it. Learn and enjoy!
